task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number)
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS IAM role with a trust policy allowing EC2 instances to assume it
Write a regular expression to extract the AWS account ID and region from an ARN string in the format 'arn:aws:service:region:account-id:resource'
